name: @agent-bridge/claude-code-channel
description: agent-bridge Claude Code channel plugin. Long-lived, session-scoped MCP server that watches ~/.agent-bridge/inbox/claude-code/ and pushes incoming messages from paired machines into the running Claude Code session as <channel source="agent-bridge"> events. Companion to the agent-bridge mcp-server (tools-only) plugin.
author: EthanSK
